response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, meeting a key requirement. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and his entrepreneurial founding of GISCollective are strong positive signals. However, the role is a Director-level strategic position requiring recognized AI expertise. Bogdan's deep experience is primarily in web and systems development, with AI being a very recent focus. His leadership appears more at the team and project level rather than the high-level strategic planning and customer advisory capacity described in the job description.
strengths: Extensive 18+ years of software engineering experience across a wide variety of technologies and domains.
Demonstrates strong initiative and leadership through founding a company (GISCollective) and leading workshops.
Recent, hands-on experience in the AI space, specifically with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field.
The depth of AI experience seems limited and very recent, not the long-term, recognized expertise the role prefers.
Resume does not demonstrate experience with director-level strategic planning or advising external customers on technology adoption.

key_factors.factor: Depth and Tenure of AI Expertise
